{"body":"## 関連

- Backlog
  - [[ecnavi-batch QA] SFn 失敗通知設定](https://ecnstaff.backlog.jp/view/SKT_4-369)
- 参考 PR
  - https://github.com/voyagegroup/ecnavi-aws-cloudformation/pull/4401
  - https://github.com/voyagegroup/ecnavi-aws-cloudformation/pull/4402
  - https://github.com/voyagegroup/ecnavi-aws-cloudformation/pull/4403
  - https://github.com/voyagegroup/ecnavi-aws-cloudformation/pull/4389 (SNS, Chatbot 部分のみ)

## 概要

やっていることは https://github.com/voyagegroup/ecnavi-aws-cloudformation/pull/4401#issuecomment-2398815455 と同じ。
QA 環境は EventBridge が存在しないため、Sandbox と違って SNS, Chatbot 設定も本 PR に含む。

## ChangeSet

以下の順序で適用。

- [x] [ap-northeast-1.ecnavi:ecnavi-qa01-SNS-Topic](https://ap-northeast-1.console.aws.amazon.com/cloudformation/home?region=ap-northeast-1#/stacks/changesets?stackId=arn:aws:cloudformation:ap-northeast-1:692692482124:stack/ecnavi-qa01-SNS-Topic/85b0a350-e3ae-11e7-aff7-50fa13f1d0ad) 
- [x] [ap-northeast-1.ecnavi:ecnavi-qa01-Chatbot-SlackChannelConfiguration](https://ap-northeast-1.console.aws.amazon.com/cloudformation/home?region=ap-northeast-1#/stacks/changesets?stackId=arn:aws:cloudformation:ap-northeast-1:692692482124:stack/ecnavi-qa01-Chatbot-SlackChannelConfiguration/55726d00-faf4-11ed-890b-061c3630b8cd) 
- [x] [ap-northeast-1.ecnavi:ecnavi-qa01-StepFunctionsStateMachine-Batch](https://ap-northeast-1.console.aws.amazon.com/cloudformation/home?region=ap-northeast-1#/stacks/changesets?stackId=arn:aws:cloudformation:ap-northeast-1:692692482124:stack/ecnavi-qa01-StepFunctionsStateMachine-Batch/b877b860-7b18-11ef-b5eb-06e305617617) 
- [x] [ap-northeast-1.ecnavi:ecnavi-qa01-Events-Rule](https://ap-northeast-1.console.aws.amazon.com/cloudformation/home?region=ap-northeast-1#/stacks/changesets?stackId=arn:aws:cloudformation:ap-northeast-1:692692482124:stack/ecnavi-qa01-Events-Rule/280998d0-85e4-11ef-9fb8-0a5323837d83) 
- [x] [ap-northeast-1.ecnavi:common-IAM-Role-Personal](https://ap-northeast-1.console.aws.amazon.com/cloudformation/home?region=ap-northeast-1#/stacks/changesets?stackId=arn:aws:cloudformation:ap-northeast-1:692692482124:stack/common-IAM-Role-Personal/d272bb90-e6d0-11e7-8616-50a6866998c6) 

## 動作確認

レビュー完了後、https://github.com/voyagegroup/ecnavi-aws-cloudformation/pull/4402#issuecomment-2395993693 と同じ方法で動作確認を行う。

- https://github.com/voyagegroup/ecnavi-batch/pull/1555 をデプロイ
- StepFunctions を下記コマンドで実行

```json
{
  "command": "put-job:sample:time-consuming-job",
  "arguments": [
    "--sleep-interval=2",
    "--times=3"
  ]
}
``` 

- エラーになっていることの確認 (StepFunctions, ECS Task)
- #ecnavi_qa_error に通知が飛んでいることを確認
- StepFunctions のリドライブを実行できることを確認","files":[{"path":"configs/mapping-ecnavi.yml","additions":2,"deletions":0},{"path":"templates/ecnavi/ap-northeast-1/common/IAM-Role-Personal.yml","additions":5,"deletions":0},{"path":"templates/ecnavi/ap-northeast-1/ecnavi-qa01/Chatbot-SlackChannelConfiguration.yml","additions":2,"deletions":1},{"path":"templates/ecnavi/ap-northeast-1/ecnavi-qa01/Events-Rule.yml","additions":31,"deletions":0},{"path":"templates/ecnavi/ap-northeast-1/ecnavi-qa01/SNS-Topic.yml","additions":14,"deletions":0},{"path":"templates/ecnavi/ap-northeast-1/ecnavi-qa01/SNS-TopicPolicy.yml","additions":35,"deletions":0},{"path":"templates/ecnavi/ap-northeast-1/ecnavi-qa01/StepFunctionsStateMachine-Batch.yml","additions":0,"deletions":11}],"title":"[ecnavi-batch QA] SFn のエラーをイベントとする EventBridge を作成"}

index 0000000000..af77ba7ee0
--- /dev/null
+++ b/templates/ecnavi/ap-northeast-1/ecnavi-qa01/Events-Rule.yml
@@ -0,0 +1,31 @@
+---
+AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
+Description: ""
+Parameters:
+  StackBaseName:
+    Type: String
+    Default: "ecnavi-qa01"
+    Description: "BaseName for this stack."
+Resources:
+  EventsRuleEcnaviBatchNotifySFnError:
+    Type: "AWS::Events::Rule"
+    Properties:
+      Name: !Sub "${StackBaseName}-ecnavi-batch-notify-sfn-error"
+      Description: "Rule for notifying Ecnavi Batch Step Functions error"
+      State: "ENABLED"
+      EventPattern:
+        source:
+          - "aws.states"
+        detail-type:
+          - "Step Functions Execution Status Change"
+        detail:
+          status:
+            - "FAILED"
+            - "TIMED_OUT"
+            - "ABORTED"
+          stateMachineArn:
+            - "Fn::ImportValue": !Sub "${StackBaseName}-SfnStateMachineBatchArn"
+      Targets:
+        - Id: "notify-ecnavi-batch-sfn-error"
+          Arn:
+            "Fn::ImportValue": !Sub "${StackBaseName}-SNSTopicEcnaviBatchErrorArn"
diff --git a/templates/ecnavi/ap-northeast-1/ecnavi-qa01/SNS-Topic.yml b/templates/ecnavi/ap-northeast-1/ecnavi-qa01/SNS-Topic.yml
index 820eda6cdb..c20e79c66d 100644
--- a/templates/ecnavi/ap-northeast-1/ecnavi-qa01/SNS-Topic.yml
+++ b/templates/ecnavi/ap-northeast-1/ecnavi-qa01/SNS-Topic.yml
@@ -80,6 +80,16 @@ Resources:
           Value: !Sub "${StackBaseName}-ses-deliveries"
         - Key: "ResourceGroup"
           Value: !Sub "${StackBaseName}"
+  SNSTopicEcnaviBatchError:
+    Type: "AWS::SNS::Topic"
+    Properties:
+      TopicName: !Sub "${StackBaseName}-ecnavi-batch-error"
+      DisplayName: "Error notifications for ecnavi-batch"
+      Tags:
+        - Key: "Name"
+          Value: !Sub "${StackBaseName}-ecnavi-batch-error"
+        - Key: "ResourceGroup"
+          Value: !Sub "${StackBaseName}"
 Outputs:
   SNSTopicEcnaviJobRecorderArn:
     Value: !Ref SNSTopicEcnaviJobRecorder
@@ -105,3 +115,7 @@ Outputs:
     Value: !Ref "SNSTopicSESDeliveries"
     Export:
       Name: !Sub "${StackBaseName}-SNSTopicSESDeliveriesArn"
+  SNSTopicEcnaviBatchErrorArn:
+    Value: !Ref "SNSTopicEcnaviBatchError"
+    Export:
+      Name: !Sub "${StackBaseName}-SNSTopicEcnaviBatchErrorArn"
diff --git a/templates/ecnavi/ap-northeast-1/ecnavi-qa01/SNS-TopicPolicy.yml b/templates/ecnavi/ap-northeast-1/ecnavi-qa01/SNS-TopicPolicy.yml
index 1047c46c9a..287ca1183c 100644
--- a/templates/ecnavi/ap-northeast-1/ecnavi-qa01/SNS-TopicPolicy.yml
+++ b/templates/ecnavi/ap-northeast-1/ecnavi-qa01/SNS-TopicPolicy.yml
@@ -137,3 +137,38 @@ Resources:
                 aws:SourceOwner: !Sub "${AWS::AccountId}"
       Topics:
         - "Fn::ImportValue": !Sub "${StackBaseName}-SNSTopicSESDeliveriesArn"
+  SNSTopicPolicyEcnaviBatchError:
+    Type: "AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy"
+    Properties:
+      PolicyDocument:
+        Version: "2012-10-17"
+        Statement:
+          # デフォルトのポリシー、別ポリシーを追加すると消えてしまうため明示的に記述
+          - Sid: "DefaultPolicy"
+            Effect: "Allow"
+            Principal:
+              AWS: "*"
+            Action:
+              - "sns:GetTopicAttributes"
+              - "sns:SetTopicAttributes"
+              - "sns:AddPermission"
+              - "sns:RemovePermission"
+              - "sns:DeleteTopic"
+              - "sns:Subscribe"
+              - "sns:ListSubscriptionsByTopic"
+              - "sns:Publish"
+            Resource:
+              "Fn::ImportValue": !Sub "${StackBaseName}-SNSTopicEcnaviBatchErrorArn"
+            Condition:
+              StringEquals:
+                aws:SourceOwner: !Sub "${AWS::AccountId}"
+          # Step Functions のエラーを EventBridge を経由して通知するために追加
+          - Sid: "NotifyEcnaviBatchError"
+            Effect: "Allow"
+            Principal:
+              Service: "events.amazonaws.com"
+            Action: "sns:Publish"
+            Resource:
+              "Fn::ImportValue": !Sub "${StackBaseName}-SNSTopicEcnaviBatchErrorArn"
+      Topics:
+          - "Fn::ImportValue": !Sub "${StackBaseName}-SNSTopicEcnaviBatchErrorArn"

file.content:
---
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: ""
Parameters:
  StackBaseName:
    Type: String
    Default: "voyagemarketing-sandbox01"
    Description: "BaseName for this stack."
  Service:
    Type: String
    Default: "pex"
    Description: "Service name for this stack."
  Role:
    Type: String
    Default: "batch"
    Description: "Role name for this stack."
Resources:
  SfnStateMachineBatch:
    Type: 'AWS::StepFunctions::StateMachine'
    Properties:
      StateMachineName: !Sub "${StackBaseName}-${Service}-${Role}"
      RoleArn: !GetAtt IAMRoleStepFunctionsBatch.Arn
      LoggingConfiguration:
        Destinations:
          - CloudWatchLogsLogGroup:
              LogGroupArn: !GetAtt LogsLogGroup.Arn
        IncludeExecutionData: true
        Level: ERROR
      Definition:
        Comment: "pex-batch を実行する。Rails Runnerのみ実行できる。" # TODO: パラメータサンプル追加
        StartAt: "ConstructCommand"
        TimeoutSeconds: 600 # TODO: sandboxなので一旦10分
        States:
          ConstructCommand:
            Type: "Pass"
            Parameters:
              "command.$": "States.Array(States.Array('bundle', 'exec', './bin/rails', 'runner', '-e', 'production'), States.Array($.command), $.args[*])"
            Next: "RunCommand"
            Comment: "入力をRails Runnerコマンドに変換し、ECSタスクで実行可能な形式に整形"
          RunCommand:
            Type: "Task"
            Resource: "arn:aws:states:::ecs:runTask.sync"
            Parameters:
              LaunchType: "FARGATE"
              Cluster:
                "Fn::ImportValue": !Sub "${StackBaseName}-EcsCluster-${Service}-01Name"
              TaskDefinition:
                "Fn::ImportValue": !Sub "${StackBaseName}-EcsTaskDefinitionPexBatchArn"
              NetworkConfiguration:
                AwsvpcConfiguration:
                  AssignPublicIp: "DISABLED"
                  SecurityGroups:
                    - "Fn::ImportValue": !Sub "${StackBaseName}-EC2SgEc2baseId"
                    - "Fn::ImportValue": !Sub "${StackBaseName}-${Service}-EC2SgEc2BatchId"
                  Subnets:
                    - "Fn::ImportValue": !Sub "${StackBaseName}-EC2SubnetEc2PexBatchAId"
                    # - "Fn::ImportValue": !Sub "${StackBaseName}-EC2SubnetEc2PexBatchCId" #sandboxはAZの分散をしない
              EnableExecuteCommand: true
              Overrides:
                Cpu.$: $$.Execution.Input.cpu
                Memory.$: $$.Execution.Input.memory
                ContainerOverrides:
                  - Name: "app"
                    "Command.$": "$.command[*][*]"
            Retry:
              - ErrorEquals: ["ECS.AmazonECSException", "ECS.ServerException"]
                # ref: https://repost.aws/knowledge-center/ecs-fargate-runtask-capacity
                # ref: https://repost.aws/ja/knowledge-center/ecs-api-common-errors
                # Retry 1回目: エラー発生から40s後（0s + 40s）
                # Retry 2回目: エラー発生から120s後（40s + 2*40s）
                # Retry 3回目: エラー発生から280s後（120s + 2*2*40s)
                # リトライを延ばす場合、多重実行の問題がないか確認が必要
                BackoffRate: 2
                IntervalSeconds: 40
                MaxAttempts: 3
                JitterStrategy: "FULL"
            Next: "Success"
            Comment: "Rails Runnerを実行"
          Success:
            Type: "Succeed"
          # TODO: StepFunctionsでエラーを拾ったら通知する
          # Fail:
          #   Type: "Fail"
  IAMRoleStepFunctionsBatch:
    Type: "AWS::IAM::Role"
    Properties:
      Path: !Sub "/${StackBaseName}/"
      RoleName: !Sub "${StackBaseName}_step_functions_${Service}_${Role}"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: "Allow"
            Principal:
              Service: "states.amazonaws.com"
            Action: "sts:AssumeRole"
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: "StepFunctionsPolicy"
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: "2012-10-17"
            Statement:
              - Effect: "Allow"
                Action:
                  - "ecs:RunTask"
                  - "ecs:StopTask"
                  - "ecs:DescribeTasks"
                Resource:
                  - "*"
              - Effect: "Allow" # TODO: EventBridge経由でエラーを拾うなら必要だけど不要と判断したら消す
                Action:
                  - "events:PutTargets"
                  - "events:PutRule"
                  - "events:DescribeRule"
                Resource:
                  - !Sub "arn:aws:events:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:rule/StepFunctionsGetEventsForECSTaskRule"
              - Effect: "Allow"
                Action: "iam:PassRole"
                Resource: "*"
                Condition:
                  StringLike:
                    iam:PassedToService: "ecs-tasks.amazonaws.com"
              - Effect: "Allow"
                Action:
                  - "logs:CreateLogDelivery"
                  - "logs:CreateLogStream"
                  - "logs:GetLogDelivery"
                  - "logs:UpdateLogDelivery"
                  - "logs:DeleteLogDelivery"
                  - "logs:ListLogDeliveries"
                  - "logs:PutLogEvents"
                  - "logs:PutResourcePolicy"
                  - "logs:DescribeResourcePolicies"
                  - "logs:DescribeLogGroups"
                Resource: "*"
  LogsLogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: !Sub "${StackBaseName}-${Service}-${Role}-sfn"
      RetentionInDays: 1 # TODO: sandboxなので1日。本番はもうちょっと増やしてもいい
Outputs:
  SfnStateMachineBatchArn:
    Value: !Ref SfnStateMachineBatch
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${StackBaseName}-SfnStateMachinePexBatchArn"

---
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Parameters:
  StackBaseName:
    Type: String
    Default: "voyagemarketing-sandbox01"
    Description: "BaseName for this stack."
  CommonStackBaseName:
    Type: String
    Default: "voyagemarketing-sandbox-common"
    Description: "BaseName for common stack."
Resources:
  SNSTopicCodepipelineApproval:
    Type: "AWS::SNS::Topic"
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Sub "${StackBaseName}-codepipeline-approval"
      Tags:
        - Key: "Name"
          Value: !Sub "${StackBaseName}-codepipeline-approval"
        - Key: "ResourceGroup"
          Value: !Sub "${StackBaseName}"
  LambdaPermissionCodepipelineApproval:
    Type: "AWS::Lambda::Permission"
    Properties:
      FunctionName:
        Fn::ImportValue: !Sub "${CommonStackBaseName}-LambdaFunctionNotifyCodepipelineApprovalFunctionName"
      Action: "lambda:InvokeFunction"
      Principal: "sns.amazonaws.com"
      SourceArn: !Ref SNSTopicCodepipelineApproval
  SNSTopicCodedeployResult:
    Type: "AWS::SNS::Topic"
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Sub "${StackBaseName}-codedeploy-result"
      Tags:
        - Key: "Name"
          Value: !Sub "${StackBaseName}-codedeploy-result"
        - Key: "ResourceGroup"
          Value: !Sub "${StackBaseName}"
  LambdaPermissionCodedeployResult:
    Type: "AWS::Lambda::Permission"
    Properties:
      FunctionName:
        Fn::ImportValue: !Sub "${CommonStackBaseName}-LambdaFunctionNotifyCodedeployResultFunctionName"
      Action: "lambda:InvokeFunction"
      Principal: "sns.amazonaws.com"
      SourceArn: !Ref SNSTopicCodedeployResult
  SNSTopicSESComplaints:
    Type: "AWS::SNS::Topic"
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Sub "${StackBaseName}-ses-complaints"
      DisplayName: "SES complaint notifications"
      Tags:
        - Key: "Name"
          Value: !Sub "${StackBaseName}-ses-complaints"
        - Key: "ResourceGroup"
          Value: !Sub "${StackBaseName}"
  SNSTopicSESBounces:
    Type: "AWS::SNS::Topic"
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Sub "${StackBaseName}-ses-bounces"
      DisplayName: "SES bounce notifications"
      Tags:
        - Key: "Name"
          Value: !Sub "${StackBaseName}-ses-bounces"
        - Key: "ResourceGroup"
          Value: !Sub "${StackBaseName}"
  SNSTopicSESDeliveries:
    Type: "AWS::SNS::Topic"
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Sub "${StackBaseName}-ses-deliveries"
      DisplayName: "SES Delivery notifications"
      Tags:
        - Key: "Name"
          Value: !Sub "${StackBaseName}-ses-deliveries"
        - Key: "ResourceGroup"
          Value: !Sub "${StackBaseName}"
  SNSTopicSESDigicoAppEmailDeliveryFeature:
    Type: "AWS::SNS::Topic"
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Sub "${StackBaseName}-ses-digico-app-email-delivery-feature"
      DisplayName: "SES for digico app mail delivery feature"
      DeliveryStatusLogging:
        - Protocol: "sqs"
          SuccessFeedbackRoleArn:
            "Fn::ImportValue": !Sub "${CommonStackBaseName}-IAMRoleSNSFeedbackArn"
          SuccessFeedbackSampleRate: 0
          FailureFeedbackRoleArn:
            "Fn::ImportValue": !Sub "${CommonStackBaseName}-IAMRoleSNSFeedbackArn"
      Tags:
        - Key: "Name"
          Value: !Sub "${StackBaseName}-ses-digico-app-email-delivery-feature"
        - Key: "ResourceGroup"
          Value: !Sub "${StackBaseName}"
  SNSTopicPexBatchError:
    Type: "AWS::SNS::Topic"
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Sub "${StackBaseName}-pex-batch-error"
      DisplayName: "Error notifications for pex-batch"
      Tags:
        - Key: "Name"
          Value: !Sub "${StackBaseName}-pex-batch-error"
        - Key: "ResourceGroup"
          Value: !Sub "${StackBaseName}"
Outputs:
  SNSTopicCodepipelineApprovalArn:
    Value: !Ref SNSTopicCodepipelineApproval
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${StackBaseName}-SNSTopicCodepipelineApprovalArn"
  SNSTopicCodedeployResultArn:
    Value: !Ref SNSTopicCodedeployResult
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${StackBaseName}-SNSTopicCodedeployResultArn"
  SNSTopicSESComplaintsArn:
    Value: !Ref "SNSTopicSESComplaints"
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${StackBaseName}-SNSTopicSESComplaintsArn"
  SNSTopicSESBouncesArn:
    Value: !Ref "SNSTopicSESBounces"
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${StackBaseName}-SNSTopicSESBouncesArn"
  SNSTopicSESDeliveriesArn:
    Value: !Ref "SNSTopicSESDeliveries"
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${StackBaseName}-SNSTopicSESDeliveriesArn"
  SNSTopicSESDigicoAppEmailDeliveryFeatureArn:
    Value: !Ref "SNSTopicSESDigicoAppEmailDeliveryFeature"
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${StackBaseName}-SNSTopicSESDigicoAppEmailDeliveryFeatureArn"
  SNSTopicPexBatchErrorArn:
    Value: !Ref "SNSTopicPexBatchError"
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${StackBaseName}-SNSTopicPexBatchErrorArn"

---
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Parameters:
  StackBaseName:
    Type: String
    Default: "voyagemarketing-sandbox01"
    Description: "BaseName for this stack."
Resources:
  SNSTopicPolicyCodepipelineApproval:
    Type: "AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy"
    Properties:
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: "Allow"
            Principal:
              AWS: "*"
            Action: "sns:Publish"
            Resource:
              "Fn::ImportValue": !Sub "${StackBaseName}-SNSTopicCodepipelineApprovalArn"
            Condition:
              ArnLike:
                aws:SourceArn:
                  - "Fn::ImportValue": !Sub "${StackBaseName}-CodePipelineVmProvisioningArn"
                  - "Fn::ImportValue": !Sub "${StackBaseName}-CodePipelineDigicoProvisioningArn"
                  - "Fn::ImportValue": !Sub "${StackBaseName}-CodePipelinePexProvisioningArn"
                  - "Fn::ImportValue": !Sub "${StackBaseName}-CodePipelineCamterProvisioningArn"
      Topics:
        - "Fn::ImportValue": !Sub "${StackBaseName}-SNSTopicCodepipelineApprovalArn"
  SNSTopicPolicyCodedeployResult:
    Type: "AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy"
    Properties:
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: "Allow"
            Principal:
              AWS: "*"
            Action: "sns:Publish"
            Resource:
              "Fn::ImportValue": !Sub "${StackBaseName}-SNSTopicCodedeployResultArn"
            Condition:
              ArnLike:
                aws:SourceArn:
                  - "Fn::ImportValue": !Sub "${StackBaseName}-CodeDeployApplicationVmProvisioningArn"
                  - "Fn::ImportValue": !Sub "${StackBaseName}-CodeDeployApplicationDigicoProvisioningArn"
                  - "Fn::ImportValue": !Sub "${StackBaseName}-CodeDeployApplicationPexProvisioningArn"
                  - "Fn::ImportValue": !Sub "${StackBaseName}-CodeDeployApplicationCamterProvisioningArn"

            Principal:

            Action:
              - "sns:GetTopicAttributes"
              - "sns:SetTopicAttributes"
              - "sns:AddPermission"
              - "sns:RemovePermission"
              - "sns:DeleteTopic"
              - "sns:Subscribe"
              - "sns:ListSubscriptionsByTopic"
              - "sns:Publish"
              - "sns:Receive"

            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceOwner: !Sub "${AWS::AccountId}"
      Topics:
        - "Fn::ImportValue": !Sub "${StackBaseName}-SNSTopicSESComplaintsArn"
  SNSTopicPolicySESBounces:
    Type: "AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy"

      PolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: "Allow"
            Principal:
              AWS: "*"

              - "sns:RemovePermission"
              - "sns:DeleteTopic"

              - "sns:ListSubscriptionsByTopic"
              - "sns:Publish"
              - "sns:Receive"
            Resource:

            Condition:

      Topics:

---
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: ""
Metadata:
  cfn-lint:
    config:
      ignore_checks:
        - E3002 # AllowedPattern Invalid Property for EcsParameters/LaunchType, EcsParameters/PlatformVersion and EcsParameters/NetworkConfiguration
Parameters:
  StackBaseName:
    Type: String
    Default: "voyagemarketing-sandbox01"
    Description: "BaseName for this stack."
Resources:
  EventsRuleSchroederEtl:
    Type: "AWS::Events::Rule"
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "${StackBaseName}-schroeder-etl"
      Description: "Scheduled task for ETL"
      ScheduleExpression: "cron(0 19 * * ? *)"
      State: ENABLED
      Targets:
        -
          Id: "schroeder-etl-mogs"
          Arn:
            "Fn::ImportValue": "ECSClusterEtlArn"
          EcsParameters:
            TaskCount: 1
            TaskDefinitionArn:
              !Sub "arn:aws:ecs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:task-definition/schroeder-etl-mogs"
            LaunchType: "FARGATE"
            PlatformVersion: "1.4.0"
            NetworkConfiguration:
              AwsVpcConfiguration:
                AssignPublicIp: "ENABLED"
                Subnets:
                  - "Fn::ImportValue": !Sub "${StackBaseName}-EC2SubnetEtlAId"
                  - "Fn::ImportValue": !Sub "${StackBaseName}-EC2SubnetEtlCId"
                SecurityGroups:
                  - "Fn::ImportValue": !Sub "${StackBaseName}-EC2SgECSSchroederEtlId"
          RoleArn:
            "Fn::ImportValue": !Sub "${StackBaseName}-IAMRoleECSEventsSchroederArn"
        -
          Id: "schroeder-etl-gods"
          Arn:
            "Fn::ImportValue": "ECSClusterEtlArn"
          EcsParameters:
            TaskCount: 1
            TaskDefinitionArn:
              !Sub "arn:aws:ecs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:task-definition/schroeder-etl-gods"
            LaunchType: "FARGATE"
            PlatformVersion: "1.4.0"
            NetworkConfiguration:
              AwsVpcConfiguration:
                AssignPublicIp: "ENABLED"
                Subnets:
                  - "Fn::ImportValue": !Sub "${StackBaseName}-EC2SubnetEtlAId"
                  - "Fn::ImportValue": !Sub "${StackBaseName}-EC2SubnetEtlCId"
                SecurityGroups:
                  - "Fn::ImportValue": !Sub "${StackBaseName}-EC2SgECSSchroederEtlId"
          RoleArn:
            "Fn::ImportValue": !Sub "${StackBaseName}-IAMRoleECSEventsSchroederArn"
        -
          Id: "schroeder-etl-gifpy"
          Arn:
            "Fn::ImportValue": "ECSClusterEtlArn"
          EcsParameters:
            TaskCount: 1
            TaskDefinitionArn:
              !Sub "arn:aws:ecs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:task-definition/schroeder-etl-gifpy"
            LaunchType: "FARGATE"
            PlatformVersion: "1.4.0"
            NetworkConfiguration:
              AwsVpcConfiguration:
                AssignPublicIp: "ENABLED"
                Subnets:
                  - "Fn::ImportValue": !Sub "${StackBaseName}-EC2SubnetEtlAId"
                  - "Fn::ImportValue": !Sub "${StackBaseName}-EC2SubnetEtlCId"
                SecurityGroups:
                  - "Fn::ImportValue": !Sub "${StackBaseName}-EC2SgECSSchroederEtlId"
          RoleArn:
            "Fn::ImportValue": !Sub "${StackBaseName}-IAMRoleECSEventsSchroederArn"
        -
          Id: "schroeder-etl-camter"
          Arn:
            "Fn::ImportValue": "ECSClusterEtlArn"
          EcsParameters:
            TaskCount: 1
            TaskDefinitionArn:
              !Sub "arn:aws:ecs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:task-definition/schroeder-etl-camter"
            LaunchType: "FARGATE"
            PlatformVersion: "1.4.0"
            NetworkConfiguration:
              AwsVpcConfiguration:
                AssignPublicIp: "ENABLED"
                Subnets:
                  - "Fn::ImportValue": !Sub "${StackBaseName}-EC2SubnetEtlAId"
                  - "Fn::ImportValue": !Sub "${StackBaseName}-EC2SubnetEtlCId"
                SecurityGroups:
                  - "Fn::ImportValue": !Sub "${StackBaseName}-EC2SgECSSchroederEtlId"
          RoleArn:
            "Fn::ImportValue": !Sub "${StackBaseName}-IAMRoleECSEventsSchroederArn"
  EventsRuleSchroederEtlPex:
    Type: "AWS::Events::Rule"
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "${StackBaseName}-schroeder-etl-pex"
      Description: "Scheduled task for ETL"
      ScheduleExpression: "cron(0 21 * * ? *)"
      State: ENABLED
      Targets:
        -
          Id: "schroeder-etl-pex"
          Arn:
            "Fn::ImportValue": "ECSClusterEtlArn"
          EcsParameters:
            TaskCount: 1
            TaskDefinitionArn:
              !Sub "arn:aws:ecs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:task-definition/schroeder-etl-pex"
            LaunchType: "FARGATE"
            PlatformVersion: "1.4.0"
            NetworkConfiguration:
              AwsVpcConfiguration:
                AssignPublicIp: "ENABLED"
                Subnets:
                  - "Fn::ImportValue": !Sub "${StackBaseName}-EC2SubnetEtlAId"
                  - "Fn::ImportValue": !Sub "${StackBaseName}-EC2SubnetEtlCId"
                SecurityGroups:
                  - "Fn::ImportValue": !Sub "${StackBaseName}-EC2SgECSSchroederEtlId"
          RoleArn:
            "Fn::ImportValue": !Sub "${StackBaseName}-IAMRoleECSEventsSchroederArn"
  EventsRuleSchroederVacuumRedshift:
    Type: "AWS::Events::Rule"
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "${StackBaseName}-schroeder-vacuum-redshift"
      Description: "Scheduled task for vacuum redshift"
      ScheduleExpression: "cron(0 3 ? * SUN *)"
      State: ENABLED
      Targets:
        -
          Id: "schroeder-vacuum-redshift"
          Arn:
            "Fn::ImportValue": "CodePipelinePipelineSchroederVacuumRedshiftArn"
          RoleArn:
            "Fn::ImportValue": !Sub "${StackBaseName}-IAMRoleEventsInvokeMaintenanceRedshiftArn"
  EventsRuleSchroederMonitorEtl:
    Type: "AWS::Events::Rule"
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "${StackBaseName}-schroeder-monitor-etl"
      Description: "Monitor task for ETL"
      EventPattern:
        source:
          - "aws.ecs"
        detail-type:
          - "ECS Task State Change"
        detail:
          clusterArn:
            - "Fn::ImportValue": "ECSClusterEtlArn"
          lastStatus:
            - "STOPPED"
      State: ENABLED
      Targets:
        -
          Id: "lambda-schroeder-monitor-etl"
          Arn:
            "Fn::ImportValue": "LambdaFunctionSchroederMonitorEtlArn"
  EventsRuleBroadcasterPublish:
    Type: "AWS::Events::Rule"
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "${StackBaseName}-broadcaster-publish"
      Description: "Scheduled task for broadcaster"
      ScheduleExpression: "cron(0 0 * * ? *)"
      State: ENABLED
      Targets:
        -
          Id: "broadcaster-publish"
          Arn:
            "Fn::ImportValue": "CodebuildBroadcasterPublishArn"
          RoleArn:
            "Fn::ImportValue": !Sub "${StackBaseName}-IAMRoleEventsInvokeBroadcasterArn"
  EventsRuleBroadcasterPurge:
    Type: "AWS::Events::Rule"
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "${StackBaseName}-broadcaster-purge"
      Description: "Scheduled task for broadcaster"
      ScheduleExpression: "cron(0 16 * * ? *)"
      State: ENABLED
      Targets:
        -
          Id: "broadcaster-purge"
          Arn:
            "Fn::ImportValue": "CodebuildBroadcasterPurgeArn"
          RoleArn:
            "Fn::ImportValue": !Sub "${StackBaseName}-IAMRoleEventsInvokeBroadcasterArn"

Topics:
        - "Fn::ImportValue": !Sub "${StackBaseName}-SNSTopicSESDeliveriesArn"
  SNSTopicPolicyPexBatchError:
    Type: "AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy"
    Properties:
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          # デフォルトのポリシー、別ポリシーを追加すると消えてしまうため明示的に記述
          - Sid: "DefaultPolicy"
            Effect: "Allow"
            Principal:
              AWS: "*"
            Action:
              - "sns:GetTopicAttributes"
              - "sns:SetTopicAttributes"
              - "sns:AddPermission"
              - "sns:RemovePermission"
              - "sns:DeleteTopic"
              - "sns:Subscribe"
              - "sns:ListSubscriptionsByTopic"
              - "sns:Publish"
            Resource:
              "Fn::ImportValue": !Sub "${StackBaseName}-SNSTopicPexBatchErrorArn"
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceOwner: !Sub "${AWS::AccountId}"
          # Step Functions のエラーを EventBridge を経由して通知するために追加
          - Sid: "NotifyPexBatchError"
            Effect: "Allow"
            Principal:
              Service: "events.amazonaws.com"
            Action: "sns:Publish"
            Resource:
              "Fn::ImportValue": !Sub "${StackBaseName}-SNSTopicPexBatchErrorArn"
      Topics:
          - "Fn::ImportValue": !Sub "${StackBaseName}-SNSTopicPexBatchErrorArn"

---
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: ""
Parameters:
  StackBaseName:
    Type: String
    Default: "voyagemarketing-sandbox01"
    Description: "BaseName for this stack."
  Service:
    Type: String
    Default: "pex"
    Description: "Service name for this stack."
  Role:
    Type: String
    Default: "batch"
    Description: "Role name for this stack."
Resources:
  SfnStateMachineBatch:
    Type: 'AWS::StepFunctions::StateMachine'
    Properties:
      StateMachineName: !Sub "${StackBaseName}-${Service}-${Role}"
      RoleArn: !GetAtt IAMRoleStepFunctionsBatch.Arn
      LoggingConfiguration:
        Destinations:
          - CloudWatchLogsLogGroup:
              LogGroupArn: !GetAtt LogsLogGroup.Arn
        IncludeExecutionData: true
        Level: ERROR
      Definition:
        Comment: "pex-batch を実行する。Rails Runnerのみ実行できる。" # TODO: パラメータサンプル追加
        StartAt: "ConstructCommand"
        TimeoutSeconds: 600 # TODO: sandboxなので一旦10分
        States:
          ConstructCommand:
            Type: "Pass"
            Parameters:
              "command.$": "States.Array(States.Array('bundle', 'exec', './bin/rails', 'runner', '-e', 'production'), States.Array($.command), $.args[*])"
            Next: "RunCommand"
            Comment: "入力をRails Runnerコマンドに変換し、ECSタスクで実行可能な形式に整形"
          RunCommand:
            Type: "Task"
            Resource: "arn:aws:states:::ecs:runTask.sync"
            Parameters:
              LaunchType: "FARGATE"
              Cluster:
                "Fn::ImportValue": !Sub "${StackBaseName}-EcsCluster-${Service}-01Name"
              TaskDefinition:
                "Fn::ImportValue": !Sub "${StackBaseName}-EcsTaskDefinitionPexBatchArn"
              NetworkConfiguration:
                AwsvpcConfiguration:
                  AssignPublicIp: "DISABLED"
                  SecurityGroups:
                    - "Fn::ImportValue": !Sub "${StackBaseName}-EC2SgEc2baseId"
                    - "Fn::ImportValue": !Sub "${StackBaseName}-${Service}-EC2SgEc2BatchId"
                  Subnets:
                    - "Fn::ImportValue": !Sub "${StackBaseName}-EC2SubnetEc2PexBatchAId"
                    # - "Fn::ImportValue": !Sub "${StackBaseName}-EC2SubnetEc2PexBatchCId" #sandboxはAZの分散をしない
              EnableExecuteCommand: true
              Overrides:
                Cpu.$: $$.Execution.Input.cpu
                Memory.$: $$.Execution.Input.memory
                ContainerOverrides:
                  - Name: "app"
                    "Command.$": "$.command[*][*]"
            Retry:
              - ErrorEquals: ["ECS.AmazonECSException", "ECS.ServerException"]
                # ref: https://repost.aws/knowledge-center/ecs-fargate-runtask-capacity
                # ref: https://repost.aws/ja/knowledge-center/ecs-api-common-errors
                # Retry 1回目: エラー発生から40s後（0s + 40s）
                # Retry 2回目: エラー発生から120s後（40s + 2*40s）
                # Retry 3回目: エラー発生から280s後（120s + 2*2*40s)
                # リトライを延ばす場合、多重実行の問題がないか確認が必要
                BackoffRate: 2
                IntervalSeconds: 40
                MaxAttempts: 3
                JitterStrategy: "FULL"
            Next: "Success"
            Comment: "Rails Runnerを実行"
          Success:
            Type: "Succeed"
          # TODO: StepFunctionsでエラーを拾ったら通知する
          # Fail:
          #   Type: "Fail"
  IAMRoleStepFunctionsBatch:
    Type: "AWS::IAM::Role"
    Properties:
      Path: !Sub "/${StackBaseName}/"
      RoleName: !Sub "${StackBaseName}_step_functions_${Service}_${Role}"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: "Allow"
            Principal:
              Service: "states.amazonaws.com"
            Action: "sts:AssumeRole"
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: "StepFunctionsPolicy"
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: "2012-10-17"
            Statement:
              - Effect: "Allow"
                Action:
                  - "ecs:RunTask"
                  - "ecs:StopTask"
                  - "ecs:DescribeTasks"
                Resource:
                  - "*"
              - Effect: "Allow" # TODO: EventBridge経由でエラーを拾うなら必要だけど不要と判断したら消す
                Action:
                  - "events:PutTargets"
                  - "events:PutRule"
                  - "events:DescribeRule"
                Resource:
                  - !Sub "arn:aws:events:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:rule/StepFunctionsGetEventsForECSTaskRule"
              - Effect: "Allow"
                Action: "iam:PassRole"
                Resource: "*"
                Condition:
                  StringLike:
                    iam:PassedToService: "ecs-tasks.amazonaws.com"
              - Effect: "Allow"
                Action:
                  - "logs:CreateLogDelivery"
                  - "logs:CreateLogStream"
                  - "logs:GetLogDelivery"
                  - "logs:UpdateLogDelivery"
                  - "logs:DeleteLogDelivery"
                  - "logs:ListLogDeliveries"
                  - "logs:PutLogEvents"
                  - "logs:PutResourcePolicy"
                  - "logs:DescribeResourcePolicies"
                  - "logs:DescribeLogGroups"
                Resource: "*"
  LogsLogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: !Sub "${StackBaseName}-${Service}-${Role}-sfn"
      RetentionInDays: 1 # TODO: sandboxなので1日。本番はもうちょっと増やしてもいい
Outputs:
  SfnStateMachineBatchArn:
    Value: !Ref SfnStateMachineBatch
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${StackBaseName}-SfnStateMachinePexBatchArn"

content.text:
PR #4406を参考にvoyagemarketing-sandbox のPeXへの横展開が完了しました。

## 完了した作業の概要

**実施した変更：**

1. **SNS-TopicPolicy.yml**: PexBatchError用のSNSトピックポリシーを追加（EventBridge経由でのSNS通知を許可）

2. **Events-Rule.yml**: PeXバッチのStep Functions エラー通知用のEventBridgeルールを追加
   - FAILED, TIMED_OUT, ABORTED状態をキャッチ
   - SNSトピックに通知

3. **StepFunctionsStateMachine-Pex-Batch.yml**: 不要なTODOコメントを削除してエラーハンドリングを有効化

**既に存在していた設定：**
- SNSトピック（SNSTopicPexBatchError）
- Chatbot設定（#pex_alert_developmentチャンネルに通知）
- IAM権限設定（RedriveExecution権限を含む）
- mapping設定（Events-Ruleが含まれる）

この変更により、voyagemarketing-sandbox のPeXバッチでStep Functionsエラーが発生した際に、EventBridge経由でSlackの#pex_alert_developmentチャンネルに通知され、リドライブも実行可能になります。
